<user_query>
Search for the sailly.de website codebase. Look in common locations:
1. /home/charles2/ for any sailly* directories
2. Search for package.json files that might be the sailly.de website
3. Check if there's a Next.js project, or if it's a different framework
4. Look for any existing website structure

Return all relevant directories found, the framework being used, and the current page structure (list of pages/components).
</user_query>

input.description: List all directories under charles2 home

input.command: for d in /home/charles2/sailly*; do echo "=== $d ==="; ls "$d" 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo ""; done

input.description: List all sailly directories with file counts
input.command: for d in /home/charles2/sailly /home/charles2/sailly-browser-demo /home/charles2/sailly-dashboard /home/charles2/sailly-mvp-complete; do echo "=== $d ==="; echo "Top-level contents:"; ls -1 "$d" 2>/dev/null; echo ""; done

content.text:
I now have a comprehensive picture. Here is the full report.

---

## Sailly.de Website Codebase — Search Results

### Directories Found

Four sailly-related directories exist under `/home/charles2/`:

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `/home/charles2/sailly-mvp-complete/` | **Main sailly.de website** (Next.js 16 + React 19) |
| `/home/charles2/sailly-browser-demo/` | Backend voice-agent runtime (Python) + dashboard (Next.js 14) |
| `/home/charles2/sailly-dashboard/` | Standalone dashboard app (Next.js 14, React 18) |
| `/home/charles2/sailly/` | Older monorepo (dashboard + backend + migrations) |

---

### Primary Website: `/home/charles2/sailly-mvp-complete/apps/website/`

This is the **sailly.de public marketing website**, confirmed by:

- The root layout at `app/layout.tsx` sets `metadataBase: new URL("https://www.sailly.de")` and contains full Open Graph / Twitter / SEO metadata (lines 28–76)
- The sitemap (`app/sitemap.ts`) lists all indexed pages under `https://www.sailly.de`
- The `package.json` has `"name": "sailly-website"`

#### Framework & Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 16.0.7 (App Router)
- **React:** 19.2.0
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 4.1.9 + `tailwindcss-animate` + `tw-animate-css`
- **UI Components:** Radix UI (accordion, dialog, dropdown-menu, navigation-menu, popover, select, tabs, toast, tooltip, and ~15 more)
- **Animation:** Framer Motion 12.x, Three.js (`@react-three/fiber`, `@react-three/drei`)
- **Forms:** React Hook Form 7 + Zod 3.25
- **Charts:** Recharts 2.x
- **i18n:** Custom dictionary system with 13 locales (de, en, tr, es, ar, zh, ru, pl, fr, el, ko, vi, th) via `middleware.ts` cookie-based redirect
- **Auth:** Supabase (server/client/middleware clients at `lib/supabase/`)
- **Analytics:** Vercel Analytics, Web Vitals
- **Testing:** Playwright (local + BrowserStack + Percy visual)
- **Build:** TypeScript (with `ignoreBuildErrors: true` in next.config)

---

### Page Structure (51 page.tsx files)

**Root-level pages (redirect to default locale):**

| Route | File |
|-------|------|
| `/` | `app/page.tsx` — redirects to `/de` |
| `/contact` | `app/contact/page.tsx` |
| `/pricing` | `app/pricing/page.tsx` |

**Localized pages (`app/[locale]/...`):**

|-------|------|
| `/` (home) | `app/[locale]/page.tsx` → renders `<SaillyLanding>` |

---

### API Routes (6 route handlers)

| Route | File |
|-------|------|
| `POST /api/auth/login` | `app/api/auth/login/route.ts` |
| `POST /api/auth/logout` | `app/api/auth/logout/route.ts` |
| `GET /api/auth/me` | `app/api/auth/me/route.ts` |
| `POST /api/auth/update-login` | `app/api/auth/update-login/route.ts` |
| `POST /api/onboarding/submit` | `app/api/onboarding/submit/route.ts` |
| `GET /api/audio-validation/tests` | `app/api/audio-validation/tests/route.ts` |

---

### Key Components (36 custom components + ~50 UI components)

**Sailly-branded landing components:**
- `components/sailly-landing.tsx` — main landing page
- `components/sailly-header.tsx` — navigation header with mega-menu
- `components/sailly-footer.tsx` — site-wide footer
- `components/sailly-live-demo.tsx` — interactive demo section
- `components/sailly-dashboard-preview.tsx`
- `components/sailly-conversation-preview.tsx`
- `components/sailly-integration-section.tsx`
- `components/sailly-icon.tsx`
- `components/sailly-orb.tsx` — 3D visual
- `components/sailly-flow-builder.tsx`
- `components/sailly-workflow-pipeline.tsx`

**Other notable components:**
- `components/CookieBanner.tsx`
- `components/pricing-plans.tsx`
- `components/industry-template.tsx`
- `components/audio-demo-card.tsx`
- `components/language-audio-button.tsx`
- `components/language-bubble.tsx`
- `components/workflow-diagrams.tsx`
- `components/workflow-animation-sequence.tsx`
- `components/workflow-preview.tsx`
- `components/helix-carousel.tsx`
- `components/news-scroll-showcase.tsx`
- `components/quelly-agent.tsx`
- `components/fluid-background.tsx`
- `components/light-rays.tsx`
- `components/ios-glass-filters.tsx`
- `components/bubbles.tsx`
- `components/conditional-background.tsx`
- `components/qortex-cursor.tsx`
- `components/qortex-stats.tsx`

**~50 shadcn/ui-style components** under `components/ui/` (button, card, dialog, chart, form, etc.)

---

### i18n Configuration

- 13 supported locales: `de`, `en`, `tr`, `es`, `ar`, `zh`, `ru`, `pl`, `fr`, `el`, `ko`, `vi`, `th`
- RTL support for `ar`
- Translation dictionaries in `dictionaries/` (JSON files per locale)
- `middleware.ts` handles automatic locale detection from cookie or `Accept-Language` header
- `lib/dictionary.ts` loads translations

---

### Summary

The sailly.de website lives at **`/home/charles2/sailly-mvp-complete/apps/website/`**. It is a **Next.js 16 App Router** project with React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI, Framer Motion, and Three.js. It supports 13 languages with a cookie-based i18n middleware. The site has **51 page routes** covering landing, solutions (by industry), product features, pricing, use cases, AI impacts, blog, community, legal pages, and a logged-in dashboard area.
